caption: The video shows a first-person perspective of someone entering a residence through a wide-open, polished reddish-brown wooden door. The entrance features a long, vertical silver handle on the door and a glass pane to the right that reflects the outdoor surroundings. As the camera moves forward, it reveals a brightly lit interior with light-colored walls and polished tile flooring that reflects the ceiling lights. In the distance, a dining area is visible, containing a table and chairs positioned near beige curtains that cover a window. The camera continues to advance into the hallway, passing through the doorway and moving deeper into the living space. There are no people visible in the frames, and no on-screen text or logos are present. The scene transitions from a view of the open door to a closer look at the interior of the home.
